title: Cobblemon: CobbleStats
description: Brings Showdown-like stat and terrain info to cobblemon
body:
# Cobblemon: CobbleStats

CobbleStats is a client-side QOL mod that brings Showdown-like stats and terrain info to Cobblemon battles UI.

No need to memorize every stat change mid-battle anymore! ^^

## Compatibility
### Cobblemon 1.6.1 and 1.7.0
[Cobblemon Effectivness](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-effectiveness) should work without issue

Compatible with [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) battles

## Gamerule:
- **accuratePokeball**: Change pokeball visibility in battle 

## Current features:
- **Stats stages**: Track stats changes (Atk,Def,...)
- **Weather**: (rain, sun,...)
- **Terrain**: (Grassy terrain,...)
- **Rooms**: (Trick room,...)
- **Hazards**: (stealth rock, spikes,...)
- **Type changes**: Indicates added or replaced types
- **Other status**: Track most status effects (focus, leech seeds,...)
- **Show main types**
- **Spectating mid-battle**
- **Opponent's pokemon count**: required on server-side

Have idea for other features? I'm open for suggestions! ^^

If you find a bug report it [here](https://github.com/Flo12344/cobblemon-cobblestats/issues)
